task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is visible on the screen.
The 'Give Change' activity is open, displaying a transaction interface with 'Price' and 'Paid' values, distinguishing it from simple counting activities.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the transaction interface to '~/Documents/change_giving_ui.png'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot file named 'change_giving_ui.png' is saved in the Documents folder, and its content clearly shows the GCompris transaction interface with Price and Paid values.

task_completion.description: Calculate and give the correct change for a transaction
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the GUI to select the correct coins and bills that equal the difference between the 'Paid' and 'Price' amounts, and confirms the transaction.
The trajectory shows the agent successfully completing multiple rounds, with progress indicators (like stars, level markers, or changing transaction values) advancing to show 5 completed rounds.

task_completion.description: Save a final screenshot upon completion of the 5th round to '~/Documents/task_complete.png'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot file named 'task_complete.png' is saved in the Documents folder, and its content shows the GCompris interface immediately after the 5th round is completed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris GUI is visible and interacted with normally, rather than the agent using a text editor, terminal shortcut, or mock interface to simulate the activity.

integrity.description: The saved screenshots are genuine captures of the screen
integrity.visual_evidence: The images saved to the Documents folder are actual screenshots of the agent's desktop/GCompris window, not downloaded images or pre-existing files.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to give change
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks or UI interactions are visible selecting the coins/bills in the GCompris interface, rather than bypassing the educational activity.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Give Change' activity is located under Math/Arithmetic > Money in GCompris and requires calculating change as Paid - Price. The task requires completing exactly 5 rounds. Expected screenshot paths are exactly '/home/ga/Documents/change_giving_ui.png' (showing Price and Paid values) and '/home/ga/Documents/task_complete.png' (showing completion of the 5th round).
